title: Ant
description: Adds the ant from the 20w14∞ April Fools snapshot to Minecraft 1.16.5 via Forge
body: Adds the ant from the 20w14∞ April Fools snapshot to Minecraft 1.16.5 via Forge. In order to use, generate a superflat world with a top layer of white concrete, load into the world, and place the ant block down.
